amendment_if_yes_amended: Proceed with bucket A fixes only — top 10 ordered by cross-product impact and Foundation Law severity. Defect: code-index stale >7 days (CRITICAL), swarm simulating. Halt solo execution past 3 files/30 lines without agent consultation. Flag P0/P1 ignores per ecosystem-map.md.
rationale: Cross-product audit reveals: Law 2 (Energy Adaptation) missing in 4/5 products — only MindShift complies. Atlas Gateway decisions contradicted in BrandedBy routing logic. Code-index last updated 2026-04-18 (9 days ago) — agents are simulating. ecosystem-map.md shows open P0: 'profile-trigger mismatch' ignored. Top fix: remove red from VOLAURA UI (Law 1) — 6 files, 15 min. Second: purge 'unlock' language (Law 3) — 12 i18n files, 20 min. Third: animation safety toggle for confetti (Law 4) — 8 min. All are autonomous, no deploy needed.
risk_if_other_side_wins: Without cross-product alignment, fixes deepen fragmentation. Law 2 absence in Life Simulator and BrandedBy violates Constitution v1.7. Stale index risks swarm autonomy on false reality. Ignoring P0 items erodes trust.
